Description: Copies the data from the source operand to the destination operand.
Addressing Modes Supported: Register, Immediate, Indirect, Indexed, Direct, Direct Memory, Indirect Memory

Description: Adds the value of the second operand to the first, leaving the sum in the first operand. Performs addition of binary data.
Addressing Modes Supported: Register, Immediate, Indirect, Indexed, Direct, Memory, Constant (Immediate)

Description: Subtracts the value of the second operand from the first, leaving the difference in the first operand. Performs subtraction of binary data.
Addressing Modes Supported: Register, Immediate, Indirect, Indexed, Direct, Memory, Constant (Immediate)

Description: Compares the first operand against the second by subtracting source from destination; saves result for conditional jumps.
Addressing Modes Supported: Register, Immediate, Indirect, Indexed, Direct, Memory

Description: Computes the bitwise logical AND of the two operands and stores the result into the first.
Addressing Modes Supported: Register, Immediate, Indirect, Indexed, Direct, Memory

Description: Computes the bitwise logical OR of the two operands and stores the result into the first.
Addressing Modes Supported: Register, Immediate, Indirect, Indexed, Direct, Memory

Description: Inverts or reverses the bits in the single memory or register operand.

Jump to destination if not equal.
